title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF PATAY, IN THE CITY OF LIPA, TO SAN JOSE

chunks.text:
H. No. 3642 / 49 OG No. 9, 3805 (September, 1953)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 964, June 20, 1953 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF PATAY, IN THE CITY OF LIPA, TO SAN JOSE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Patay, in the City of Lipa, is hereby changed to San Jose.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1953.
